0101010010000000111111101101100 - ASI: 18

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 01 * 0
  011 = 0 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0111 = 01 * 11
  1010 = 1 * 010
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01100 = 011 * 00
  0101010 = 010 * 1010
  01000000 = 0100 * 0000
  01101100 = 011 * 01100
  01111111 = 0111 * 1111
  010101001000000 = 0101010 * 01000000
  0111111101101100 = 01111111 * 01101100
  0101010010000000111111101101100 = 010101001000000 * 0111111101101100
